name: OneMain Financial
description_short: Colorado Springs, CO location of OneMain Financial at 4124 Austin Bluffs Pkwy offers personal loans with weekday hours from 8:30 AM.
description_long:
OneMain Financial is located at 4124 Austin Bluffs Pkwy in Colorado Springs, CO. This standalone location serves the Austin Bluffs area with convenient weekday hours: Monday and Wednesday 8:30 AM–5:30 PM, Tuesday, Thursday, and Friday 9 AM–5:30 PM. The branch is closed on weekends.

This Colorado Springs location specializes in personal loans designed for residents facing financial challenges. Call +1 719-574-7600 to speak with a loan specialist about available options, rates, and how to apply. The team can discuss loan terms tailored to your specific financial needs.

If you're a Colorado Springs resident considering a personal loan, bring a valid ID and recent income documentation to your appointment. OneMain Financial serves individuals with varied credit profiles, making it a practical choice when traditional banks decline your application.
address: 4124 Austin Bluffs Pkwy, Colorado Springs, CO 80918

company_info.headquarters: 4124 Austin Bluffs Pkwy, Colorado Springs, CO 80918

pros: Fast funding through SpeedFunds program—money available in as little as 1 hour after loan closing
No prepayment penalties on any personal loan, allowing early payoff without additional fees
Fixed rates and fixed monthly payments throughout loan term—no variable interest or surprise payment increases
Wide loan purpose flexibility—debt consolidation, medical bills, home improvement, auto repair, moving, and more
100+ year company history with established branch network and physical locations for in-person support
Prequalification available online without affecting credit score
After-hours appointment availability to accommodate working customers' schedules
cons: APR range of 11.99%–35.99% is relatively high, especially for borrowers with lower credit scores who may receive rates near the top of the range
Minimum loan amount of $1,500 excludes consumers needing smaller emergency cash amounts ($100–$1,000)
Maximum loan amount of $30,000 may be insufficient for larger debt consolidation or home improvement projects
Requires multiple documents at closing (proof of identity, residence, and income), which may be burdensome for some applicants
Interest rates vary significantly based on creditworthiness; approval not guaranteed despite prequalification offers
best_for: Consumers with fair to poor credit seeking debt consolidation with predictable fixed monthly payments
Borrowers needing $1,500–$30,000 for specific purposes (medical bills, home repairs, emergency expenses) who value in-person support
Individuals prioritizing fast funding and flexibility in loan purpose over the lowest possible interest rates
Customers preferring established brick-and-mortar lenders with local branch access rather than online-only lenders
diagnosis: OneMain Financial is best for consumers with fair or poor credit who need $1,500–$30,000 in personal funds, value in-person support and fast access to cash, and can accept APRs in the 12%–36% range. The main caveat is that rates vary dramatically by creditworthiness, so actual APR may be at the higher end of the range for applicants with lower credit scores.
services: Specialty loans (RV, boat, motorcycle, pool, funeral)
meta_description: Colorado Springs OneMain Financial at 4124 Austin Bluffs Pkwy, CO offers personal loans for individuals with flexible terms.
